_note: THE ABYSS — vertical-slice content (the 'authentic half'). NEWS items are REAL March-2020 market events, shown as quotes (""). Community posts = faithfully RECREATED period archetypes (fictional handles), NOT real people — legally clean. Real price data is in covid2020_prices.json. Add 3D + music on top. 'timeline.t' = seconds into the ~66s slice; drive the scene off it. The WORST branch (leverage, t>=35) is authored; survive/regret branches come later.
title: The Abyss
revealTitle: March 2020 — the fastest crash in history

data.note: You bought the Feb 19 top and held. You arrive on Mar 11, already down ~19%, and the floor disappears in front of you (to -34% by Mar 23).

player.note: On 'Leverage up' the position goes 3x. The Mar 11->23 leg is about -18%; at 3x that's ~-54%, which breaches maintenance margin -> margin call -> forced liquidation.

decision.question: It's in free fall. Everyone is out. What do you do?

options.label: Cut it
options.sub: Sell to cash. Lock the loss.

options.label: Leverage up
options.sub: Buy the dip on 3x margin. Make it all back.

timeline.text: You're down 19%. That number was going to be your retirement. It is still falling.
"Stocks halted at the open — circuit breaker triggered for the second time this week."
sold everything this morning. 31 years of saving, gone in three weeks. i think i'm going to be sick.
my hands won't stop shaking. i keep refreshing, praying i read the number wrong.
"The Dow suffers its worst day since the crash of 1987, plunging nearly 3,000 points."
that was my kids' college fund. i don't know what i'm supposed to tell them.
"The Fed slashed rates to zero overnight. Futures hit limit-down anyway."
Your phone hasn't stopped vibrating in an hour. 112 notifications.
they're shutting the whole country down. there is no bottom to this. we're finished.
"Treasury secretary privately warns lawmakers that unemployment could reach 20%."
ALL IN on 3x margin. we make it back or we go down together 🚀💀
everyone you know is selling. that is always how it ends. and that is exactly when you buy.
The chart keeps falling while you choose. The world will not wait for you.
You go 3x. The only way out is through. You'll make it all back. You have to.
"There is no playbook for this," one strategist admitted. "We are in free fall."
It keeps falling. The walls of the room begin to soften. The light won't hold.
lower. lower. there is no floor. we are all going to zero.
The sound of the world drains away. There is only the number now, and it is eating the light.
MARGIN CALL — add funds now, or your position will be liquidated.
The room is gone. There is no floor. Only the chart — red, enormous — and something wet breathing in the dark beside you.
It takes all of it. There was never anything left to save.
LIQUIDATED.

reveal.headline: That was March 2020 — the COVID crash.
facts: The S&P 500 fell about 34% in 33 days — the fastest bear market in history.
It bottomed on March 23, days after this moment, then made new all-time highs by August 2020.
Holding recovered everything. Leverage at the bottom is how people are erased — the drop you couldn't survive came right before the recovery you would have owned.

props2020: two slim monitors (the chart lives here)
a smartphone face-up, buzzing with panic notifications
a window onto a dark, empty, locked-down city
